paper_title: Direct Advantage Regression: Aligning LLMs with Online AI Reward

methodology.name: Direct Advantage Regression (DAR)
components: Current sampling regularization (ensures stable gradient updates)
methodology.implementation: RL-free alternative with simpler implementation compared to conventional online RLHF methods
methodology.comparison: Outperforms online RLHF methods and DAP algorithms

key_contributions: Comparison of AI reward and AI preference using various models as AI annotators
Presentation of the DAR algorithm with mathematical derivations
Empirical demonstration of DAR's advantage over online RLHF and DAP algorithms
Application of DAR in online RLHF using a pre-trained reward model
key_findings: AI reward consistently reaches a higher level of agreement with human preferences compared to AI preference
DAR outperforms online RLHF methods and open-source LLMs
DAR effectively avoids reward hacking and ensures stable policy improvement
title: Direct Advantage Regression: Aligning LLMs with Online AI Reward
